steps.assistant_text: 21-insn do-while sentinel loop calling gl_func(*(&D+0x53C4), &scratch, 0) until result == -1. Baseline NM wrap (sentinel=-1 initializer + inlined call test) gave s-reg coloring + frame -48 exact but left a 2-word as1 const-materialization-order tie: base-lo `addiu s1,s1,0` and sentinel `addiu s0,zero,-1` emitted swapped. Permuter found that ASSIGNING `sentinel = -1` INSIDE the do-loop body (instead of as a first-statement initializer) flips the schedule so base-lo emits before sentinel, matching the target. The reassign is free (-1 is loop-invariant, hoisted by IDO).

metadata.verification: matching-build wordcmp (reloc-masked): 0 non-reloc diffs, sizes 84==84; relocs HI16/LO16 D_00000000 + R_MIPS_26 gl_func_00000000 (same placeholder convention as landed sibling gl_func_0002A50C); full make ROM byte-identical (ROM OK)
